title: Sulfaro plant
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''sulfaro plant''' was a plant native to [[Kirdo III/Legends|Kirdo III]]. It was the [[chooba]]'s favorite dish. The plant had a very meaty interior. [[Kitonak/Legends|Kitonaks]] often mimicked sulfaro plants. They would lie down and wait for a chooba to climb up to its head, looking for the plant's interior. The Kitonak would then swallow the chooba whole.
